node.name: Marcfashion
node.description:
Marcfashion is an Ecuadorian tailor shop that jumped into the technology world.
With their new landing page they are finally able to expand their goals and improve their business.

node.name: Centeravid
node.description:
Centeravid is clinic that helps adult and young men with addiction problems.
They’ve expanded their help to more people thanks to a new landing page.
